name: codex-pr-review
description: Codex-native PR review harness: load repo-backed review knowledge, read a GitHub PR through gh, build an evidence-based review packet, and post confirmed comments back to the PR.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-backed, evidence-based GitHub PR review for Codex
interface.longDescription: Turn a GitHub PR URL or number into a repeatable Codex review flow: load the consuming project's own review knowledge, read the PR diff through gh, build a review packet, and post only confirmed, anchorable comments back to the PR.
